CustomField.description: Used for Reporting on Hybrid Reps
CustomField.formula: IF( (Owner.Full_Name__c = 'Mike LaHatte' || Owner.Full_Name__c = 'Mike Waller') && (Product_Group__r.Name = 'Hardware' || Product_Group__r.Name = 'AMS'), 'David Stockbower', Owner.Manager.Full_Name__c)
CustomField.label: Hybrid Rep Manager
